metadata.title: Refresh Any View
metadata.description: Allows to refresh preview mode without reopening the note

regex.source: .error(`Module not found: ${id}. Fake process object is returned instead.`)
regex.target: .error(`Module not found: ${id}. Fake process object is returned instead.`)

regex.source: .error(`Module not found: ${id}. Empty object is returned instead.`)
regex.target: .error(`Module not found: ${id}. Empty object is returned instead.`)

regex.source: Notice("An unhandled error occurred. Please check the console for more information.")
regex.target: Notice("发生了未处理的错误。请检查控制台以获取更多信息。")

regex.source: .error(`Invalid settings from data.json. Expected Object, got: ${typeof s}`)
regex.target: .error(`Invalid settings from data.json. Expected Object, got: ${typeof s}`)

regex.source: .setName("Should auto refresh markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode")
regex.target: .setName("应在源/实时预览模式下自动刷新 markdown 视图")
.setName("应该使用快速 Markdown 视图刷新")

regex.source: .setName("Should load deferred views on auto refresh")
regex.target: .setName("应在自动刷新时加载延迟视图")

regex.source: .setDesc("Interval in seconds to auto refresh the view(s).")
.setDesc("Whether to load deferred views on auto refresh")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动刷新时是否加载延迟视图")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to load deferred views on start")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否在启动时加载延迟视图")

regex.source: .appendText("Whether to auto refresh the file view when the file is changed.")
regex.target: .appendText("当文件改变时是否自动刷新文件视图。")

regex.source: .appendText("\u26A0\uFE0F This may cause flickering or losing some UI state such as the cursor position.")
regex.target: .appendText("\u26A0\uFE0F 这可能会导致闪烁或丢失某些 UI 状态（例如光标位置）。")

regex.source: .appendText("Whether to refresh the markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode, if auto refresh is enabled.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果启用了自动刷新，是否在源/实时预览模式下刷新 markdown 视图。")

regex.source: .appendText("Whether to use quick refresh for markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode.")
regex.target: .appendText("是否在源/实时预览模式下对 markdown 视图使用快速刷新。")

regex.source: .appendText("When enabled, custom panels in the markdown view might not be refreshed.")
regex.target: .appendText("启用后，markdown 视图中的自定义面板可能不会刷新。")

regex.source: .appendText("When disabled, the full markdown view refreshing is performed, but it may cause flickering or losing some UI state such as the cursor position.")
regex.target: .appendText("禁用时，将执行完整的 markdown 视图刷新，但可能会导致闪烁或丢失某些 UI 状态（例如光标位置）。")

regex.source: .appendText("View types to include for auto refresh.")
regex.target: .appendText("查看要包括的自动刷新类型。")

regex.source: .appendText("Insert each view type on a new line")
regex.target: .appendText("在新行中插入每个视图类型")

regex.source: .appendText("If empty, all view types will be included.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果为空，则将包括所有视图类型。")

regex.source: .appendText("You can find the view type of a view via its context menu command ")
regex.target: .appendText("您可以通过上下文菜单命令找到视图的视图类型 ")

regex.source: .appendText("View types to exclude for auto refresh.")
regex.target: .appendText("查看要排除自动刷新的类型。")

regex.source: .appendText("If empty, no view types will be excluded.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果为空，则不会排除任何视图类型。")
